metadata.title: Status App | Private Messenger, Assets, Web Browser, Communities and more
metadata.description: Status App combines an end-to-end encrypted messenger and a secure browser into a private, peer-to-peer ecosystem with no phone number or email required.
metadata.notFoundDescription: The page you were looking for could not be found. Return to the Status homepage.

prefooter.title: Message, Browse, Build on your Terms

notFound.title: Oh no! It looks like you're lost
notFound.description: The page you were looking for doesn't exist

download.mobileDescription: Get the full Status experience on the go. Available free for iOS and Android.
download.scanQrDescription: Point your camera at the code to install Status straight to your phone.
download.connectorTitle: Want to improve your Status experience?
download.connectorDocsQuestion: Want to learn how it works?

home.heroDescription: Message privately, manage assets, and browse the open web in one app you alone control. No phone number, no tracking, no company in the middle
home.migrateBanner: Still on the Status Legacy mobile app? Migrate now.
home.assetDescription: A self-controlled, secure space for managing digital data, credentials, and assets across multiple networks
home.messengerDescription: Built for free speech. Peer-to-peer, fully end-to-end encrypted messaging with no backdoors, designed exclusively for secure and confidential communication with friends, family, and business partners, so no one can read or trace your conversations
home.messengerPseudonymTitle: No identity required to sign up
home.messengerPseudonymDescription: SSign up with nothing at all. No phone number, email, card, social account, bank account, or personal ID required to create a Status profile. Your profile is an anonymous identity created on your device from the moment you start, and it belongs to you alone, so you are in control of your digital identity from day one
home.metadataTitle: Keep private who your friends are
home.metadataDescription: Other apps record what you say while still logging who you talk to and when. Status records nothing. Your contacts, timing, and connections stay invisible to everyone, including the network itself
home.communitiesDescription: Group chats, forums, and communities built for real people. Create independent, censorship-resistant spaces, set your own rules, and moderate locally, without a corporation deciding what is allowed. Ownership stays in the hands of communities
home.assetControlDescription: Your assets are always under your control. Your keys live on your device, so access never depends on a company staying online or staying friendly
home.assetOverviewDescription: See everything you hold in a single, always-current view. Assets update in real time, so you never juggle multiple apps just to know where you stand.
home.digitalCollectionDescription: Keep all of your digital collectibles together in one gallery. View what you own, show it off and carry it with you across every device, all from inside the app.
home.openSourceDescription: Status is fully open source. Every layer, backend, interface, and Logos Messaging protocol, is open to read, audit, and verify how it works
home.decentralisedDescription: No company server sits between you and your contacts. End-to-end encrypted messages move across a peer-to-peer network, and communities are self-hosted by their owners
home.secureDescription: Self-controlled keys secure your assets and messages with elliptic curve cryptography
home.communityDrivenDescription: Status is built in the open by its contributors and users. The community helps shape priorities, governance, and its future
home.permissionlessDescription: Your identity is fully yours. No central registry, no platform control. Join anonymously and connect with anyone, anywhere
home.freeAndAdFreeDescription: No ads, no tracking. The app stays free and your data stays yours
home.keycardDescription: Ditch the clutter of scattered chats, links, and browser tabs. Status Desktop brings your entire workspace into a single, high-performance local app. Coordinate with your team and access key information without losing focus

apps.metaDescription: Use Status on the go with the mobile app, or get the full set of features on desktop. Private messaging, asset management and a built-in browser, on every device you own.
apps.title: Get Status on every device
apps.description: Use Status on the go with the mobile app, or get the full suite on desktop. Everything stays in sync, so your messages and your assets follow you everywhere.
apps.createCommunityDescription: Use Status Desktop to launch your own community, set the rules, and manage members and channels. You host it yourself, so no outside platform can take it down or change the terms
apps.p2pDescription: Run Status Desktop to help keep the network strong and independent. It’s powered by people, not company servers, and built on the Logos Messaging protocol
apps.fullSuiteDescription: Status Desktop brings everything from the mobile app and more, including community creation and hosting
